result.name: Tiara of Pailis
result.description: Level: 7 Form: Tiara Effect: Allows the wearer to fly a long distance each round (as an action). The wearer can control their speed, direction, and height. Depletion: 1 in 1d20

sections.name: Tiara of Pailis
sections.effect:
Level: 7

Form: Tiara

Effect: Allows the wearer to fly a long distance each round (as an action). The wearer can control their speed, direction, and height.

Depletion: 1 in 1d20
